jobs.title: YouTube Video Producer (Senior Coordinator)
jobs.blurb: Own YouTube content end-to-end — concept, shoot, edit, publish — for NASCAR drivers and events. Wants a portfolio with 2+ self-shot-and-edited YouTube videos and motorsports familiarity. Verified open on NASCAR's live careers site.

jobs.title: Promotion Producer (WSOC-TV Telemundo)
jobs.blurb: Write, shoot, and edit promotional/community spots and social ads for Telemundo Charlotte on Premiere Pro, After Effects, and Photoshop. Note: role also handles Spanish-language news promotion content. Verified open on CMG's live careers site.

jobs.title: Senior Producer, Production Operations
jobs.blurb: A stretch role — wants 7+ years and leans heavily into camera/equipment management and digital-asset archiving rather than editing. Worth a look given the Panthers/NASCAR broadcast overlap, but the experience bar is above Brendan's current 5 years. Verified open on TeamWork Online.

jobs.title: Lead Videographer
jobs.blurb: Financial-services company (not sports/media), but the role itself is a strong skills match: 5+ years video production, Premiere Pro/After Effects, full concept-to-delivery ownership. Verified open on Indeed, posted today.

jobs.title: Video Editor / Motion Graphic Designer
jobs.blurb: Software company's in-house Marketing team — edit product demos, testimonials, and short-form social content (YouTube Shorts, TikTok, Reels) using Premiere Pro, After Effects, Photoshop, and Illustrator. Straightforward skills match outside the sports/media world. Verified open on Indeed.

jobs.title: Content Creator and Campaign Specialist
jobs.blurb: This is the social media marketing side of the field, not straight video editing — builds and runs multi-channel campaigns (social, email, web) with short-form video as one piece. Good option if Brendan wants to broaden beyond pure editing. Verified open on Indeed; link goes to DNP's Indeed jobs page since the direct post uses a rotating tracking link — search "Content Creator and Campaign Specialist."

jobs.title: YouTube Channel Manager (Freelance/Internship)
jobs.blurb: A local freelance/gig option, not a stable salaried role: build out a Charlotte art-gallery lounge's YouTube/social presence, pay is performance-based (per-video plus a cut of monetization) rather than guaranteed hourly. Worth knowing about, but treat the pay as variable. Verified open on Indeed. Must be 21+ (venue is a bar).

jobs.title: Freelance Video Editing Gigs (Marketplace)
jobs.blurb: Not a single job — this is a live search of Upwork's current video-editing gig postings (YouTube channels, docuseries post-production, social clips, and more), refreshed constantly. Requires a free Upwork profile to submit proposals. Good option if Brendan wants freelance work on the side or between full-time roles.

inProgress.status: Resume & cover letter already prepared — confirmed still open as of 2026-07-02
